Personal API Key: 个人资料 API 密钥
Your PostHog project ID (found in projec: 您的 PostHog项目 ID (在项目设置中找到 URL)
Base URL for private API calls (default:: Private API 调用的基本URL (默认：https://us.posthog.com)
Connect your PostHog account.\n\n**Perso:
Connect your PostHog account.

**Personal API Key**: Go to PostHog → Settings → Personal API Keys → Create personal API key.

**Project ID**: Found in the URL when viewing your project: `/project/{id}/`

**API Host**: The base URL for private API calls.
- US Cloud (default): `https://us.posthog.com`
- EU Cloud: `https://eu.posthog.com`
- Self-hosted: your instance URL (e.g. `https://posthog.mycompany.com`)

**Ingestion Host**: The base URL for event capture.
- US Cloud (default): `https://us.i.posthog.com`
- EU Cloud: `https://eu.i.posthog.com`
- Self-hosted: same as your API Host
Capture a custom event in PostHog: 在 PostHog中捕获一个自定义事件
Create a new PostHog project in your org: 在您的组织中创建一个新的 PostHog项目
List all feature flags in your PostHog p: 列出PostHog项目中的所有功能标志
Get a list of identified users in your P: 获取您PostHog项目中已识别用户的列表
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Unique identifier for the user performin: 执行此操作的用户唯一标识符(例如用户ID或电子邮件地址)
Additional event properties as key/value: 作为键/值对的其他事件属性
Whether to anonymize incoming IP address: 是否隐藏传入的 IP 地址
Maximum number of feature flags to retur: 要返回的最大特征标记数量 (默认：100)
Filter persons by email or name: 通过电子邮件或名称筛选人员
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
HEAD: 黑色
Filter by specific event name (leave emp: 按特定事件名称进行筛选(为所有事件留空)
